DP.020.0000:
You know how Pokémon have types like
Water, Fire, and Grass?\f
They say those types have strengths
and weaknesses against other types.
DP.020.0001:
In the Union Room upstairs, you can
chat and trade with other people.\f
And that’s not all you can do.
Check it out!
DP.020.0002:
You can still catch a Pokémon if you
already have six traveling with you.\f
It automatically gets sent to the PC
network in Pokémon Centers.\f
Knowing that, I can keep on catching
more and more Pokémon!\f
It’ll make it more fun to check
the PC in any Pokémon Center!
